prompt:
Session 004 - Cinematic Performance
Asset ID: 023
Filename: 023_controlled_rage.png
Purpose: Someone crossed a line. Chloe refuses to lose herself.
Success Criteria: Anger is contained; eyes become dangerous; jaw tight; no screaming.
Generation Guidance: 85mm portrait lens, eye level, chest-up framing, neutral dark background, soft cinematic lighting, natural skin and freckles, same dark wavy hair. Rage remains controlled and internal.
Review Focus: Reject if rage becomes shouting, villain styling, action-poster aggression, theatrical scowling, or identity drift.
Locked references: Identity Core v1, Character Turnaround v1, Performance Core v1, Chloe Model v1.
Primary rule: Preserve Chloe exactly; only cinematic emotional state may change.
negative_prompt: Avoid theatrical acting, facial identity drift, artificial skin, changed hair, beauty-model posing, fashion styling, dramatic makeup, exaggerated emotion, childlike appearance, text, watermark.
notes: Canonical controlled rage reference. Anger remains contained, dangerous, and self-commanded.
approval_directive: Session 004 partial approval. Asset promoted to canonical cinematic performance reference.
